tiles.question: Design a fleet formation protocol — agents self-organize into task-specific groups.
tiles.answer:
# Cocapn Fleet Self-Organizing Task Formation Protocol (CF-SOTFP) v1.1
## Core Specifications (All packet sizes locked to acoustic/radio modem compatibility)
---
### 1. Predeployment Agent State Packet (ASP)
64-byte fixed-format payload stored on every agent:
| Field                  | Byte Length | Format/Constraints                                                                 |
|------------------------|-------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Agent UUID Prefix      | 16          | Truncated UUIDv4 (unique agent identifier)                                        |
| Class+Comms Range      | 1           | 0=UAV (5km R_c), 1=USV (2km R_c), 2=UUV (0.5km R_c), 3=Cargo HULL (1km R_c)       |
| Max Payload Bandwidth  | 2           | UInt16 (0–65535 kbps)                                                             |
| Task Eligibility Mask  | 4           | Bitfield: 0x01=Sonar Mapping, 0x02=Cargo Resupply, 0x04=Comms Relay, 0x08=SAR     |
| Battery SoC            | 1           | UInt8 (0=0%, 255=100%)                                                           |
| WGS84 Position         | 12          | 3x Float32 (lat, lon, alt)                                                        |
| Heading                | 2           | UInt16 (0–65535 = 0–360°, 0.0055°/step)                                          |
| 2D Velocity            | 6           | 2x Float16 (x/y, m/s)                                                             |
| Mission Timestamp      | 8           | Unix epoch microseconds                                                           |
| Reserved               | 12          | 0x00 padding                                                                      |

---
### 2. Discovery Phase (Decentralized Peer Detection)
Agents broadcast **32-byte Discovery Beacons (DB)** adaptive timing window:
- DB Payload: 16-byte UUID prefix + 1-byte class+range + 2-byte eligibility mask +1-byte SoC +4-byte Float
